name: testcontainers-go
description: Go implementation of Testcontainers providing throwaway, on-demand Docker containers (databases, message brokers, browsers) for integration tests.

seo.title: testcontainers-go — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: testcontainers-go: Go implementation of Testcontainers providing throwaway, on-demand Docker containers (databases, message brokers, browsers) for integration t

when_to_use: Spin up real Postgres/Redis containers for Go tests
Integration tests without mocks using real dependencies
Automatic container teardown after test completion
Multi-container test scenarios with Docker networking

pros: Real Docker services in Go integration tests
cons: Requires Docker in CI and dev machines
Test runtime is slower than unit tests
Disk and memory cost can add up
review.verdict: Essential for serious Go integration testing; it pays back its Docker overhead within the first week.
review.best_for: Go teams needing realistic integration tests against real databases and queues
review.not_for: CI environments without Docker access or latency-sensitive unit suites
